# =========================================================================
# lead-acid — pitched single notes. ~200 prompts.
# Style mix (generated lines): ~76% EDM/electronic. EDM-forward, full spectrum.
# Generated by gen_prompts.py (deterministic). Curated lines preserved on top.
# =========================================================================
